MASTER CALENDAR COURT

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-29-2018 Text Ruling

MOTION To Deem Facts As Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION To Deem Facts As Admitted Per CRC 3.1304(c).

The motion is unopposed and is granted in its entirety, including an award of sanctions for discovery abuse in the amount of $260.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)
